lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner — used to verify the multirole slot fit, cargo capacity and engineered jump range.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Federal Corvette ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, optional + military internal sizes and hardpoint counts behind the multirole loadout and peer table.

sources.label: Inara — Federal Corvette
sources.what: Ship overview cross-check — hull price, internals layout, and the Federal rank requirement noted in Cost & Access.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Federal Corvette lore, Core Dynamics manufacturer, and role notes backing the multipurpose write-up.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: In-depth Federal Corvette review covering its tank, handling and versatility beyond pure combat.
